message:
Merge PR #2548: fix(docker): detect arch dynamically and add gt to PATH

Uses dpkg --print-architecture for multi-arch Docker builds and adds /app/gastown to PATH.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2548
Author: michaellady

files.patch:
@@ -21,8 +21,9 @@ RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
     && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* /var/cache/apt/archives/*
 
 # Install Go from official tarball (apt golang-go is too old)
-RUN curl -fsSL "https://go.dev/dl/go${GO_VERSION}.linux-amd64.tar.gz" | tar -C /usr/local -xz
-ENV PATH="/usr/local/go/bin:/home/agent/go/bin:${PATH}"
+RUN ARCH=$(dpkg --print-architecture) && \
+    curl -fsSL "https://go.dev/dl/go${GO_VERSION}.linux-${ARCH}.tar.gz" | tar -C /usr/local -xz
+ENV PATH="/app/gastown:/usr/local/go/bin:/home/agent/go/bin:${PATH}"
 
 # Install beads (bd) and dolt
 RUN curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/steveyegge/beads/main/scripts/install.sh | bash
